name: Britt Sharrock Golf
about: Britt Sharrock Golf is a golf performance and coaching program focused on providing instruction for golfers of all ages and ability levels. The facility operates through a partnership with GolfTEE Performance Center, utilizing indoor simulators and on-course time for lessons when weather permits. Their offerings include private instruction, junior programs, adult classes, fitness training, corporate events, and club fitting services, with an emphasis on technology-driven analysis using TrackMan systems.
why_golfers_like_it: Technology-driven approach with TrackMan analysis and multi-angle video feedback
Year-round junior program for young golfers aged 6-18
Experienced coaching with 17+ years of program development
Flexible booking system powered by Upper Hand for easy reservations
Small group camps and adult golf schools for focused improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on premises
No mention of alcohol service on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan certified system used for lessons and analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, private instruction and on-course playing classes suggest bringing your own clubs would be beneficial, though simulator sessions may provide alternative options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food service on premises, but no BYOB policy is specified, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator bay rentals and on-course playing classes are available, with individual lessons typically running 60 minutes.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Britt Sharrock Golf offers a year-round junior program for golfers aged 6-18 with over 100 members, making it specifically designed for junior development.
